positive: Minimalist vector illustration, centered design, featuring a majestic soaring golden eagle above a geometric mountain range at sunrise. The style is sophisticated line art combined with solid block color fills (flat design). Use a limited, striking color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and gold ochre. The composition should be symmetrical and highly stylized, focusing on clean silhouettes and negative space, perfect for apparel printing. Intricate details in the feathers and rock layers, high contrast, clean edges, vector graphic quality.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, photorealism, 3d render, bokeh, gradients
